hero_subtitle: SFTY Business creates a single operational layer that connects provider outputs to reduce repeated KYB checks, streamline onboarding, and strengthen audit readiness across your compliance processes.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk

problem_title: Duplicate KYB reviews disrupt onboarding flow
problem_description: Compliance teams spend excessive time rerunning corporate identity and ownership checks across multiple providers. This leads to slower onboarding, inconsistent risk assessments, and fragmented audit trails that complicate regulatory and banking reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects repeated corporate and ownership checks from multiple providers into one unified workflow, reducing redundant reviews while preserving audit evidence and supporting clear, consistent decisions for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From duplicate KYB checks to decisions
workflow_description: SFTY identifies overlapping KYB provider outputs, consolidates entity reviews, routes cases for assessment, records decisions and preserves evidence within one structured workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another workflow tool. The layer above providers
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented KYB reviews into a unified operational layer that reduces duplicate checks, preserves audit evidence and supports clearer compliance decision trails.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY handle duplicate KYB reviews?
faq_1_answer: SFTY identifies and consolidates duplicate KYB reviews by linking entity and ownership data across providers into a connected workflow, reducing repeated checks and manual work.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect KYB with other providers?
faq_2_answer: SFTY sits above KYB, KYC, KYT and screening providers, connecting their outputs into combined workflows for consistent risk assessment and comprehensive compliance reviews.
faq_3_question: How is audit evidence preserved for duplicate reviews?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and provider outputs as audit-ready evidence, supporting traceability and review readiness for duplicated or consolidated KYB processes.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with our existing compliance stack?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is provider-neutral and designed to integrate with existing KYB, KYC, KYT and screening tools, creating a coordinated compliance operating layer above them.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or KYB providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows to improve efficiency, control and auditability.
final_title: Reduce duplicate KYB reviews with one workflow
final_description: See how SFTY connects multiple KYB provider outputs into connected case workflows, audit evidence and streamlined compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
